---
title: "GiottoDB"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Overview}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```
## Overview
`GiottoDB` is a module in the [Giotto Suite ecosystem](https://drieslab.github.io/Giotto_website/articles/ecosystem.html) that provides database support for core `Giotto` functionality through the [dbverse](https://github.com/drieslab/dbverse).

[overview.png](/path/to/overview.png){fig.align='center'}

## GiottoDB function support
The following functions from Giotto are supported by `GiottoDB` objects:

#### Subcellular
- [x] [GiottoClass::createGiottoPoints()](https://drieslab.github.io/GiottoClass/reference/createGiottoPoints.html)
- [x] [GiottoClass::createGiottoPolygon()](https://drieslab.github.io/GiottoClass/reference/createGiottoPolygon.html)
- [x] [GiottoClass::calculateOverlap()](https://drieslab.github.io/GiottoClass/reference/calculateOverlap.html)
- [x] [GiottoClass::overlapToMatrix()](https://drieslab.github.io/GiottoClass/reference/overlapToMatrix.html)

#### Expression
- [x] [GiottoClass::createExprObj()](https://drieslab.github.io/GiottoClass/reference/createExprObj.html)
- [x] [GiottoClass::getExpression()](https://drieslab.github.io/GiottoClass/reference/getExpression.html)
- [x] [Giotto::filterGiotto()](https://drieslab.github.io/Giotto_website/reference/filterGiotto.html)
- [x] [Giotto::processExpression()](https://drieslab.github.io/Giotto_website/reference/processExpression.html)
- [x] [Giotto::normalizeGiotto()](https://drieslab.github.io/Giotto_website/reference/normalizeGiotto.html)
- [x] [Giotto::addStatistics()](https://drieslab.github.io/Giotto_website/reference/addStatistics.html)
- [x] [Giotto::calculateHVF()](https://drieslab.github.io/Giotto_website/reference/calculateHVF.html)

## Dynamic Method Dispatch
While `GiottoDB` provides scalable database-backed methods of core `Giotto` functions, it does not natively support all of Giotto's functionality.

To support full functionality of `Giotto` objects, the following global options can be set (once per session) to establish a fallback to methods from other packages. This will convert GiottoDB subobjects
into alternative objects that are recognized by `Giotto`.

- `dbSpatial` --> `terra::spatVector` (default) or `sf::sf`
- `dbSparseMatrix` --> `Matrix::dgCMatrix` (default)
- `dbDenseMatrix` --> `matrix::matrix` (default)

Triggering this fallback will result in a warning message indicating that the GiottoDB's subobject will be converted into the selected fallback object and that for large datasets this may trigger a memory error.

## Performance
Benchmark can be found at the [benchmarks vignette](path/to/benchmarks).
